post.subject: Good start!
post.body:
Had class test for Programming module - in which im learning Java - Tuesday. It was done on computers, over a website set up by the university. 50 multiple choice questions, 50 minutes to do it. Whenever you  are finished you hit 'Submit' at the buttom of the page and on the following page the mark is displayed. I spent the day before and morning before studying very hard. Going through all the notes we had been given over the last 3 weeks. It payed off. I got 81%. Surprisingly better than anyone else that i know!! Found out today that the average was 64%. So as you can imaging Im pretty damn pleased with that! 

Im still very confused by some stuff and although I did well in the test I cant even programe much yet, still a little behind with that aspect of things. But I got such a good grade by studying hard beforehand and Im determined to continue to read notes and keep up on stuff contuniously. 

Yesterday I decided not to go to lecture i had at 9am, instead i stayed in bed until 2:30. Went into town about an hour later, brought back something and changed something else. 

I tried to get my bank account upgraded to a student account but i was DECLINED! Im not pleased about that at all! Im only 19, I have have a job for 3 years always having money going into my account. Maybe its something to do with the fact that I would have about £200 go in every month then by the end of the month it would often be down to nothing... That could be the reason, and the fact that when i had my contract phone 2 years ago i didnt make payments on time twice... aw well, Im determined never to get a contract phone again so i wont have that problem again. Im also from now on going to go easy on my money. Ive upgraded my computer (though i still need to get a new monitor), Ive bought plenty of clothes, few CDs quite a few DVDs (Pulp Fiction, Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind, Wonderland, Butterfly Effect, Good Will Hunting, Kill Bill Vol 2, I think thats it) and spent lots of money on radom crap. 

Im gona learn how to cook so that im not spending so much money eating every day, I will spend less on alcohol, when im drinking I will just buy a 1/4 of vodka - much cheaper than anything else! 

Etc Etc. 

Im going home this weekend and plan to just spend time with my family, parents and brother - whom i miss and know misses me.

comments.body: I want a student account. I live in perpetual fear of being overdrawn...
comments.author: floorswine
